caption: A man with a mustache, wearing a white shirt under a red sleeveless jacket, is seated inside a vehicle, speaking and gesturing with his hands. He is being interviewed, as indicated by an ANI-branded microphone held in front of him. The video is presented as a news broadcast with several graphic overlays. A red banner at the top asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", while a large "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom. On the sides of the screen, smaller portrait photos and names of various political figures are listed, including "डिप्टी CM", "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". In the final frame, the side panel changes to show "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार", while a new red banner appears at the top reading "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेज". The timestamps in the bottom right corner remain consistent at "10:04 PM".
